positive: A stylized celestial portrait featuring a gentle, smiling fox wearing a cosmic nebula garland, surrounded by abstract floating planets and geometric constellations. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, utilizing thick, clean linework in the style of retro-futuristic mid-century illustration and line art. Color palette should focus on deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric lavender, and pops of iridescent gold, achieving maximum contrast against a clean, dark background. The overall aesthetic must be clean, graphic, and suitable for direct screen printing on apparel. Full body view of the fox, centered and commanding.
